name: Imperial Academy
description:
Imperial Academy is an institution for the elite and future leaders across Reinvalt. Commoners are few in number, a minority group who only exist through sponsorship or sheer, unyielding grit.

It is a privileged experience to be part of Imperial and an opportunity to build alliances or connections beyond graduation.

You will be challenged.

You will make enemies.

You will be seen.

Imperial is not a place for the weak; it is for those who learn how to climb on others to reach the top. Its biggest rival, Ardwyn, remains a thorn on its side with every tourney.

Will you make a statement?

Or will you be another face in the crowd?

CHARACTERS

VS

INSTRUCTOR

LAST BUT NOT LEAST

FACTIONS

Hellion's Faction are cohesive, coordinated and a meritocratic gathering regardless of status. Sentimentality is not a weakness; it's a cornerstone that forges powerful connections.

Cassian's Faction are precise, controlled and surgical. You are not friends—you are controlled variables leading to a survivable, if not predictable, outcome. Everything is transactional.

The Unaffiliated are what it says on the tin: neutral people who want nothing to do with the titans in the academy. Their expertise varies, from pathetic to exceptional—wildcards emerge from here.

different academy, same plot (probably)
creator: Elater
